name: MineDojo/MineDojo
capability_target: licensed local Minecraft and Minecraft-like open-world RL, crafting, navigation, and player-coop pressure

input_contract.world: disposable local world or open-source bridge world
input_contract.license: user-owned local Minecraft runtime required for full Minecraft harnesses

output_contract.world_events: blocks, mobs, damage, navigation, goal progress
output_contract.residuals: navigation, survival, crafting, recovery, and player-instruction failures

contamination_policy: Treat public Minecraft tasks as calibration. Keep local disposable worlds and held-out seeds separate from any training traces.
regression_policy: If mastered, demote to regression suite and preserve any failures in residual escrow.

permission_envelope.memory: benchmark-local metadata and task context only
permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, sandboxes, and report writers
permission_envelope.network: forbidden during scoring; catalog import only through license-gated source tools

teacher_role: Only diagnose adapter/source bugs after local smoke fails; do not score or solve benchmark items.
